text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week successfully finishes her debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As an Umamusume aiming to be number one in
Japan, she chooses the Japanese Derby as her
next major goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But first, she sets off to race in the Kisaragi Sho
as a stepping stone.
